themes.exampleQuote: Always reliable for chicken katsu or beef bulgogi bowls.
Easy fast hole in the wall with delicious food.

sentiment_summary: Reviewers consistently praise Oishii Donburi's reliable katsu and bulgogi bowls in a relaxed, casual setting, but one reviewer flagged notably poor staff attitude and impractical dine-in packaging as real deterrents.
notable_quote: Always reliable for chicken katsu or beef bulgogi bowls.
